SHAFT_Engine, 10.2.20260615

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CauseCategory
    Stable top-level diagnosis taxonomy.
    Confidence
    Confidence assigned by an explainable deterministic rule.
    DeterministicRuleEngine
    Ordered explainable rules for common SHAFT failure categories.
    Diagnosis
    Versioned deterministic diagnosis.
    DoctorAdvisory
    Separately identified optional provider advisory that never replaces the deterministic diagnosis.
    DoctorAdvisory.Hypothesis
    One provider hypothesis.
    DoctorAdvisory.Metadata
    Safe provider, timing, usage, cache, and fallback metadata.
    DoctorAdvisory.Observation
    One provider observation.
    DoctorAdvisory.ProviderAnalysis
    Versioned provider output accepted by Doctor.
    DoctorAdvisory.RecommendedAction
    One provider-recommended action.
    DoctorAdvisory.Status
    Advisory outcome.
    DoctorAiAnalysisRequest
    Explicit policy for one optional provider-assisted Doctor analysis.
    DoctorAiAnalysisResult
    Deterministic Doctor result plus a separately identified optional advisory.
    DoctorAiAnalysisService
    Builds minimized Doctor provider requests and validates separately rendered advisories.
    DoctorAnalysisRequest
    Explicit local input and privacy policy for one deterministic analysis.
    DoctorAnalysisResult
    Analyzer outputs and diagnosis.
    DoctorAnalysisSummary
    Safe analysis summary for CLI or MCP responses without retained evidence content.
    DoctorAnalyzer
    Offline deterministic SHAFT evidence analyzer.
    DoctorCli
    Executable local CLI for SHAFT Doctor.
    DoctorFormatException
    Safe evidence or report format failure.
    DoctorHashing
    SHA-256 helpers for stable identifiers and integrity metadata.
    DoctorJsonCodec
    Deterministic JSON codec for Doctor evidence, diagnosis, and reports.
    DoctorRedactor
    Structured and textual deterministic redaction for Doctor evidence.
    DoctorRepairAiRequest
    Explicit policy for optional provider-generated structured repair patches.
    DoctorRepairAiService
    Generates optional schema-constrained file patches through the shared AI boundary.
    DoctorRepairPatchResult
    Optional provider patch result that never changes repository state.
    DoctorRepairProposalResult
    MCP-friendly result for deterministic or optional provider-assisted repair proposals.
    DoctorRepairPublicationRequest
    Separate explicit approval for publishing a reviewed Doctor proposal.
    DoctorRepairRequest
    Explicit policy for creating an isolated Doctor repair proposal.
    DoctorRepairRequest.FilePatch
    Structured file replacement applied only inside the isolated worktree.
    DoctorRepairRequest.FilePatch.Operation
    Supported file operations.
    DoctorRepairRequest.ValidationCommand
    Tokenized Maven command; no shell parsing or interpolation is performed.
    DoctorRepairService
    Creates reviewed repairs in isolated Git worktrees and publishes only explicitly approved draft pull requests.
    DoctorReportWriter
    Writes deterministic human-readable Doctor reports.
    EvidenceBundle
    Versioned portable evidence bundle.
    EvidenceCategory
    Evidence categories supported by the deterministic collector.
    EvidenceCollector
    Collects bounded local evidence through explicit allowlisted adapter boundaries.
    EvidenceItem
    One sanitized, bounded, portable evidence item.
    EvidenceProvenance
    Portable provenance for one evidence item.
    Finding
    Cited observation or inference emitted by a rule.
    Finding.Kind
    Finding epistemic type.
    Finding.Severity
    Finding severity.
    RedactionSummary
    Safe aggregate redaction metadata without original values.
    Remediation
    Deterministic next action linked to findings and evidence.
    RepairProposal
    Reviewable Doctor repair proposal created in an isolated Git worktree.
    RepairProposal.PatchManifestEntry
    Guarded file change metadata.
    RepairProposal.Publication
    Published draft pull-request details.
    RepairProposal.Status
    Proposal lifecycle.
    RepairProposal.ValidationResult
    Validation result with bounded diagnostics and populated Allure evidence.
    RepairPublicationResult
    Safe result from an approval-gated draft publication.
